ai_lines_desc: This pomp lets you display the number of AI lines on your leek's page.
angry_desc: Change your leek's expression: it will look angry.
farmer_title_desc: This pomp lets you give yourself a title, displayed on your page, in the forum, in advanced tooltips and other places in the game.
happy_desc: Change your leek's expression: it will look happy.
hold_weapon_desc: This pomp lets your leek hold a weapon in its hand, visible on its page and anywhere its avatar appears in the game.
leek_title_desc: This pomp lets you give your leeks a title, displayed on their page and other places in the game.
metal_desc: Adds metal plates on your leek's image.
